name: Variety Pack - Friskies Lil' Gravies Roast Beef Flavor Cat Food Complement, 1.55-oz, case of 16, Salmon, Chicken & Turkey Flavors
description: Friskies Lil' Gravies Roast Beef Flavor Cat Food Complement, 1.55-oz, case of 16 — Friskies Lil’ Gravies Roast Beef Flavor Cat Food Complement offers the gravy flavor that cat tastebuds crave. Each pouch of this gravy-licious delight can be served as a topper for dry food or as a treat between meals.
